stimulus: One of the oldest surviving sundials is a small limestone device unearthed in Egypt and thought to be more than 3,300 years old. The dial ______blank hours of daylight, displays a curved scale, and includes markings for noon.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice A is the best answer. The convention being tested is subject-verb agreement. The singular verb "measures" agrees in number with the singular subject "dial."

Choice B is incorrect because the plural verb "are measuring" doesn't agree in number with the singular subject "dial." Choice C is incorrect because the plural verb "have measured" doesn't agree in number with the singular subject "dial." Choice D is incorrect because the plural verb "measure" doesn't agree in number with the singular subject "dial."
